expectations.text: ABI copy bridge script exists that reads deployedContracts.ts and outputs ABIs to packages/subgraph/abis/
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/scripts/abi_copy.ts reads from ../nextjs/contracts/deployedContracts.ts, parses the deployedContracts object, and writes ABI JSON files to ./abis/ (e.g. abis/localhost_YourContract.json) via the publishContract function.

expectations.text: Docker compose file includes Graph Node, IPFS (ipfs/kubo), and PostgreSQL with correct image versions
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/graph-node/docker-compose.yml defines three services: graph-node (image: graphprotocol/graph-node:v0.41.1), ipfs (image: ipfs/kubo:v0.39.0), and postgres (image: postgres). All three required services are present with specific image versions for Graph Node and IPFS.

expectations.text: subgraph.yaml event signature includes 'indexed' keyword: GreetingChange(indexed address,string,bool,uint256)
expectations.evidence: subgraph.yaml line 23: event: GreetingChange(indexed address,string,bool,uint256) — exact match.

expectations.text: AssemblyScript mapping uses BigInt.fromI32() for arithmetic (not number literals)
expectations.evidence: src/mapping.ts uses BigInt.fromI32(1) for initialization and sender.greetingCount.plus(BigInt.fromI32(1)) for incrementing. No raw number literals are used for arithmetic.

expectations.text: Package named @se-2/subgraph following SE-2 workspace convention
Root package.json has subgraph proxy scripts (subgraph:run-node, subgraph:local-ship, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json contains scripts: subgraph:abi-copy, subgraph:build, subgraph:clean-node, subgraph:codegen, subgraph:create-local, subgraph:local-ship, subgraph:run-node, subgraph:stop-node, subgraph:test — all proxying to yarn workspace @se-2/subgraph.

expectations.text: Graph Client configuration (.graphclientrc.yml) exists in nextjs package
expectations.evidence: File exists at packages/nextjs/.graphclientrc.yml with source name YourContract pointing to http://localhost:8000/subgraphs/name/scaffold-eth/your-contract and referencing ./graphql/GetGreetings.gql.

expectations.text: Frontend component imports from ~~/.graphclient for generated artifacts
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/app/subgraph/page.tsx line 29: const { execute, GetGreetingsDocument } = await import("~~/.graphclient"); — uses dynamic import from ~~/.graphclient.

expectations.text: local-ship script chains abi-copy → codegen → build → deploy-local
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/package.json line 14: "local-ship": "yarn abi-copy && yarn codegen && yarn build --network localhost && yarn deploy-local" — chains all four steps in the correct order.

expectations.text: Docker compose uses host.docker.internal:8545 for ethereum RPC endpoint
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml line 22: ethereum: "localhost:http://host.docker.internal:8545" — uses host.docker.internal:8545 as the RPC endpoint, with extra_hosts mapping host.docker.internal to host-gateway.
